revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-210

Pulse width (deprecated) Pulse length (deprecated)

The interval between the first and last instant at which the instantaneous value of a pulse or of its envelope reaches a specified fraction of the peak amplitude.

Reference: B.S.
